action: Violations were cited in the following area(s).

violations.description: "wash hands" sign not posted at hand wash facility.
Appropriately scaled metal stem-type thermometer not provided ore used to evaluate temperatures of potentially hazardous foods during cooking, cooling, reheating and holding.
Food Protection Certificate not held by supervisor of food operations.
"Choking first aid" poster not posted. "Alcohol and pregnancy" warning sign not posted. Latex gloves, sign not posted. Inspection report sign not posted.

action: Violations were cited in the following area(s).

violations.description: Milk or milk product undated, improperly dated or expired.
"wash hands" sign not posted at hand wash facility.

Hand washing facility not provided in or near food preparation area and toilet room. Hot and cold running water at adequate pressure not provide at facility. Soap and an acceptable hand-drying device not provided.
Toilet facility not maintained and provided with toilet paper, waste receptacle and self-closing door.
Immersion basket not provided, used or of incorrect size. Incorrect manual technique. Test kit and thermometer not provide or used. Improper drying practices.
Non-food contact surface improperly constructed. Unacceptable material used. Non-food contact surface or equipment improperly maintained.
"Choking first aid" poster not posted. "Alcohol and pregnancy" warning sign not posted. Latex gloves, sign not posted. Inspection report sign not posted.
Food Protection Certificate not held by supervisor of food operations.

action: Violations were cited in the following area(s).

violations.description: Evidence of roaches or live roaches present in facility's food and/or non-food areas.
Facility not vermin proof. Harborage or conditions conducive to vermin exist.
Food Protection Certificate not held by supervisor of food operations.

action: Violations were cited in the following area(s).

violations.description: Facility not vermin proof. Harborage or conditions conducive to attracting vermin to the premises and/or allowing vermin to exist.
Food Protection Certificate not held by supervisor of food operations.
Live roaches present in facility's food and/or non-food areas.

action: Violations were cited in the following area(s).

violations.description: Live roaches present in facility's food and/or non-food areas.
Facility not vermin proof. Harborage or conditions conducive to attracting vermin to the premises and/or allowing vermin to exist.

Filth flies or food/refuse/sewage-associated (FRSA) flies present in facility’s food and/or non-food areas.  Filth flies include house flies, little house flies, blow flies, bottle flies and flesh flies.  Food/refuse/sewage-associated flies include fruit flies, drain flies and Phorid flies.

Bulb not shielded or shatterproof, in areas where there is extreme heat, temperature changes, or where accidental contact may occur.
